summary: This is a brief index post where Julia Evans shares a collection of computer-related drawings she made during November 2016. The post serves as a gallery linking to her daily drawing practice, covering topics including networking. The actual content is primarily visual (images that aren't captured in the markdown), with minimal text. She points readers to drawings.jvns.ca as the permanent home for the collection.
key_points: Julia Evans committed to making daily drawings about computers throughout November 2016
The drawings cover general computing topics and networking specifically
She established a dedicated site (drawings.jvns.ca) as a permanent archive for her visual explanations
money_quotes: I've been making drawings about computers every day in November.
key_insight: Daily practice of creating visual explanations about technical topics is a valuable way to learn and teach computing concepts.
